title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: HLP tokenomics: 31% to points holders, empty order book theory, and the wealth transfer to come
summary_description: Mogi and PBR break down HLP allocation, TGE mechanics, and what happens when genesis goes live in hours.

key_moments.label: Points redistribution: May underperformed, October-November favored new entrants
Best strategy in hindsight: all-in perps, zero trading, hold everything
31% to points holders announced; bear case 10%, bull case 50-60%
Day-one circulating supply: 69% to users when team and foundation locked
HLP allocation 0.012%; empty order book theory confirmed
Genesis at 07:30 UTC Nov 29; unclear if HLP goes live instantly or delayed
One billion supply; potential $100M+ resting buy-side liquidity at launch
30% emissions distribution still unclear: staking rewards vs. future incentives to governance
